properties.name: The Derry Walls
properties.description: Walk the only remaining completely intact walled city in Ireland. A fantastic way for families to explore history while enjoying elevated views of the city.

properties.name: Springhill (National Trust)
properties.description: A beautiful 17th-century estate featuring a 'haunted' house, a charming costume collection, and a wonderful natural play area for children.

properties.name: Mussenden Temple
properties.description: Perched dramatically on the edge of a cliff, this iconic temple offers breathtaking coastal views and beautiful estate walks perfect for a family adventure.
